title: Deck Of Cards
description: Tired of building/farming/traveling? Play cards with your friends!
body:
Craft

To craft a deck of cards, you need 6 pieces of paper and 3 ink pouches.

How usage deck of cards?

A deck of cards can be used as an item or block.

Use it as a item:

Open menu(right-click) to view its contents. A menu opens with all the maps.

Menu features:

  • Two pages
  • Moving between pages is available via special buttons (redstone)
  • You can put only cards in the deck
  • Shuffle card button (dragon egg)

Use it as a block:

  • Place(Shift + right-click)
  • Take card(right-click)
  • Break(Shift + left-click)

How usage card?

Place card on block(right-click)
And break(left-click)

Plugin Features

  • Localazation

    There are two languages available: Russian and English
    You can change one of the configuration files to change the names or translate everything into your language.
    Select language you can in config.yml(ru, en...)

Versions

  • Tested versions: 1.21.6
  • Available versions: 1.21 - 1.21.x

    • Lower versions will not work correctly.
